description: CompositionPink sleeveless top made of tussar silk/cotton blended fabric, has a cowl neck, sequins along the arms and at the bust and a slightly curved hemFitRegularWash careDry clean onlyfabindia specialises in natural, craft-based contemporary pieces, while also providing rural craft persons a platform to use traditional dyeing and fabric printing techniques. Capturing the essence of Indian roots, crafted with a focus on the traditional, this top sets the tone for an all-new ethnic trend. Wear this with denims or cotton pantsModel statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33&rdquo
